name: Social Growth Assistant
description:
Purpose
An AI-native growth companion that helps small- and micro-business owners turn social engagement into measurable business outcomes. It designs, tests, learns, and optimizes content strategies across multiple platforms, reducing time-to-value and friction for users with limited marketing expertise.

Core Problem
SMB owners spend too much time creating generic content that doesn’t convert. They need a trusted copilot that can plan, learn, and act on their behalf — closing the loop between content → engagement → lead → conversion.

How It Works
Intent Capture — Collects structured inputs (business category, goal, tone, city, platforms).
Content Generation — Produces a contextual 7-day posting plan with captions, CTAs, and timing.
Feedback Loop — Analyzes engagement metrics to refine future recommendations.
Agentic Actions — Suggests or performs next steps (scheduling, replies, offers).

Growth Monetization — Surfaces upgrade triggers once users achieve success milestones.

Demonstrated Capabilities-
Agentic Learning Loop → Adapts from prior performance data.
Cross-Platform Optimization → Tailors tone and creative per channel.
Next best Actions → Executes the “next best step.”
Monetization Layer → Turns user success into a PLG flywheel.

Prototype Goal-
Show how a lightweight Gemini-powered workflow can evolve from a content generator into an agentic growth system. Each prompt in this workspace simulates one future-ready capability:
1 Learning Loop → Insight driven iteration
2 Cross-Platform Optimization → Multi-surface reach
3 Next best Action → Operational execution
4 Monetization Layer → Value capture

End Outcome
Demonstrate a credible path from MVP → Agentic Copilot → Revenue Engine — illustrating product systems thinking, growth experimentation mindset, and AI-native design at scale.
